name: Tequila Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tequila, lemon or lime juice, chili powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and fresh ground pepper in a large bowl.
2. Add the chicken wings to the marinade and stir gently until well coated.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 4 hours, preferably overnight.
4. Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the chicken wings from the refrigerator and place them on the preheated grill.
6. Cook the wings for about 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are golden brown and crispy.
7. Baste the wings with cooking oil as needed during grilling.
8. Serve hot with your favorite salsa or cheese dip.
